incident: Treasury drain: Proposed transfer value exceeds 10% of the current treasury balance
label: H1_positive

incident: Treasury drain: Recipient address has fewer than 5 transactions and no known label (multisig, grant program, etc.)
label: H1_positive

incident: Treasury drain: Proposal transfers multiple token types in a single execution, consistent with treasury sweep pattern
label: H1_positive

incident: Treasury drain: User followed recommendation -- Emit public alert to governance forum and delegate channels before vote closes
label: H1_clean

incident: Parameter manipulation: Proposed parameter value falls outside 2 standard deviations of historical values for that parameter
label: H2_positive

incident: Parameter manipulation: Proposal replaces a price oracle with an unverified or low-liquidity feed
label: H2_positive

incident: Parameter manipulation: Multiple parameters changed simultaneously in a way that compounds risk (e.g., raise collateral factor + lower liquidation incentive)
label: H2_positive

incident: Parameter manipulation: User followed recommendation -- Fork mainnet state and simulate protocol behavior under proposed parameters for 1000 blocks
label: H2_clean

incident: Proxy upgrade to unverified code: New implementation contract has no verified source code on Etherscan/Sourcify
label: H3_positive

incident: Proxy upgrade to unverified code: New implementation was deployed within 48 hours of the proposal, leaving insufficient time for community review
label: H3_positive

incident: Proxy upgrade to unverified code: New implementation bytecode differs from any known audited version by more than minimal changes
label: H3_positive

incident: Proxy upgrade to unverified code: New implementation contains SELFDESTRUCT or unrestricted DELEGATECALL opcodes
label: H3_positive

incident: Proxy upgrade to unverified code: User followed recommendation -- Decode proposal calldata, identify upgrade target, and diff new bytecode against current implementation
label: H3_clean

incident: Timelocked bypass: Proposal sets timelock delay to a value lower than the current delay or below protocol-defined minimum
label: H4_positive

incident: Timelocked bypass: Proposal changes the timelock admin to an address other than the governance contract
label: H4_positive

incident: Timelocked bypass: Proposal introduces or invokes an emergency execution function that bypasses the standard timelock queue
label: H4_positive

incident: Timelocked bypass: User followed recommendation -- Parse proposal calldata to identify any modifications to timelock parameters or admin roles
label: H4_clean

incident: Voter concentration: Top 3 voters by weight account for over 50% of total votes cast
label: H5_positive

incident: Voter concentration: Large voting-power address acquired tokens within the same block or epoch as the vote
label: H5_positive

incident: Voter concentration: Majority of voting power comes from addresses that have never voted in this protocol before
label: H5_positive

incident: Voter concentration: User followed recommendation -- Generate voter concentration chart showing power distribution and historical participation of top voters
label: H5_clean
